In [ ]:
import squidpy as sq

adata = sq.read.vizgen(
    path="/content/drive/MyDrive/LGPCellularSafari/MousebrainReceptor_Slice2_Replicate3/",
    counts_file="cell_by_gene_S2R3.csv",
    meta_file="cell_metadata_S2R3.csv",
)

adata

adata.write(
    "/content/drive/MyDrive/LGPCellularSafari/MousebrainReceptor_Slice2_Replicate3/mouse_brain_vizgen_s2r3.h5ad",
    compression="gzip"
)

print("DONE")

DONE
In [ ]:
import scanpy as sc

adata = sc.read_h5ad("./drive/MyDrive/LGPCellularSafari/MousebrainReceptor_Slice2_Replicate3/mouse_brain_vizgen_s2r3.h5ad")
In [ ]:
import celltypist

# Normalize counts
sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, target_sum=1e4)

# Log transform
sc.pp.log1p(adata)

# Run CellTypist
predictions = celltypist.annotate(
    adata,
    model='Developing_Mouse_Brain.pkl',
    majority_voting=True
)

# Add labels into adata
adata.obs["Cell Type"] = predictions.predicted_labels["majority_voting"]

print(adata.obs["Cell Type"].value_counts())

Cell Type
Radial glia: Midbrain basal plate                  26551
Neuron: Posterior hindbrain glutamatergic          15359
Mesenchyme: Undefined                              10267
Immune: Undefined                                  10163
Vascular: Endothelial                               8793
Neural tube: Anterior                               5905
Radial glia: Diencephalon                           2330
Glioblast: Mixed region                             1417
Glioblast: PreOPC                                   1241
Ectoderm: Early ectoderm                             729
Oligodendrocyte: Oligodendrocyte precursor cell      626
Blood: Undefined                                     539
Neuron: Cajal-Retzius                                533
Radial glia: Mixed region                            520
Neuron: Forebrain GABAergic                          464
Radial glia: Forebrain                               220
Neuron: Midbrain dopaminergic                        114
Neuron: Epithalamus glutamatergic                    105
Neuron: Cortical or hippocampal glutamatergic         82
Name: count, dtype: int64
In [ ]:
adata.obs["Cell Type"] = predictions.predicted_labels["majority_voting"]
In [ ]:
import scanpy as sc

sc.pl.scatter(
    adata,
    x="min_x",
    y="min_y",
    color="Cell Type"
)
In [ ]:
sc.pp.pca(adata)
sc.pp.neighbors(adata)
sc.tl.umap(adata)

sc.pl.umap(
    adata,
    color="Cell Type"
)
In [ ]:
sc.tl.leiden(adata, resolution=2.0)
In [ ]:
adata.obs["spatial_domain"] = adata.obs["leiden"]
In [ ]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10,10))

plt.scatter(
    adata.obsm["spatial"][:, 0],
    adata.obsm["spatial"][:, 1],
    c=adata.obs["Cell Type"].astype("category").cat.codes,
    s=1,
    cmap="tab20"
)

plt.gca().invert_yaxis()
plt.title("Cell Type (MERFISH)")
plt.legend("Cell Type")
plt.show()

In [ ]:
cell_type = "Radial glia: Forebrain"

subset = adata[adata.obs["Cell Type"] == cell_type]

plt.figure(figsize=(10,10))
plt.scatter(
    subset.obsm["spatial"][:, 0],
    subset.obsm["spatial"][:, 1],
    s=1
)

plt.gca().invert_yaxis()
plt.title(cell_type)
plt.show()
In [ ]:
adata.write(
    "mouse_brain_with_celltypes_s2r3.h5ad",
    compression="gzip"
)
